calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., Appearing for Plaintiff Bank of The West.
Order Waiving appearance of witness on file. Declaration of James Roach on file.

No appearance by defaulted defendant Betty Gentry and Kevin Gentry.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Principal $15,702.07
Interest $991.07
Costs $1099.37
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $20,292.51.

Plaintiff maintainsa perfected security interest in that certain 2006 Case Skid Loader, Serial Number: N6M441762, is the rightful owner thereof, is entitled to ist immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover said property form defendants. In the event that plaintiff obtains possession of and sells said personal property hereafter, defendant shall receive all credits to which they are entitled by lag against this judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
